_note: Hermes-style goal definition. Reflection scores recent performance against these thresholds.
_startingEquity_note: Live account balance after WTI test trade (2026-05-25). Used as denominator for return % and drawdown %.
_targetAbsolute_note: Moonshot goal: $8.1k → $500k in 60 days. Mathematically requires ~60x growth (≈7.4%/day compounded). Single-trade leverage to hit this carries blow-up risk. Hermes should treat this as a stretch target — score still uses targetReturn30d below for steady-state reflection.
_targetReturn30d_note: 677% per 30d derived from 60-day moonshot. Use 0.05 (5%/30d) for steady-state mode if downscaling the goal.
_maxDrawdown_note: Loosened from 0.08 to 0.50 — moonshot goals require accepting deeper drawdown. Tighten back to 0.08 if reverting to steady-state.
